div.div:
Run N+1
: gap-hunter reads GAP-NNN to proactively check known blind spots.
impact-mapper reads IMP-NNN to warm-start area→cluster discovery.
Entities accumulate: occurrenceCount++ on confirmation, confidence promoted on ladder.

switch.text: Run N+1: gap-hunter reads GAP-NNN to proactively check known blind spots....
